description: The Tribesmen are a prominent outlaw motorcycle club based in the North Island of New Zealand, founded in 1980 in Murupara. They are known for their yellow colors and middle finger salute, and have chapters in Ōtara, Northland, Rotorua, Murupara, and Christchurch. The club was one of the first organized groups to import and manufacture methamphetamine in New Zealand, but lost influence due to overindulgence in their own product. As of 2020, they are considered the dominant gang in Christchurch.
